ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: IF( AND(Historical_Transaction_Y_N__c=True, AND( OR( ISPICKVAL(Last_Three_Transaction_Years_1_year__c , ''), ISNULL(Last_3_Years_Transaction_Amount_1_USD__c), INCLUDES( Transaction_Settlement_Method_1_3year__c , '') ), OR( ISPICKVAL(Last_Three_Transaction_Years_2_year__c , ''), ISNULL(Last_3_Years_Transaction_Amount_2_USD__c), INCLUDES( Transaction_Settlement_Method_2_3year__c , '') ), OR( ISPICKVAL(Last_Three_Transaction_Years_3_year__c , ''), ISNULL(Last_3_Years_Transaction_Amount_3_USD__c), INCLUDES( Transaction_Settlement_Method_3_3year__c , '') ) ) ), TRUE, FALSE)
ValidationRule.errorMessage: One of the group should be filling in. [Last Three Transaction Years 1] /[Last Three Transaction Years 2] /[Last Three Transaction Years 3]
